description: Aggregated action items, decisions, follow-ups, questions, risks, and key information extracted from recent meetings by the meeting-action-items-extractor orchestration. One entry per scheduler run grouped via groupId. Surfaces a transcript availability rollup so the user can tell whether low extraction counts reflect quiet meetings or missing transcripts.

contentTemplate.label: My High-Priority Items
contentTemplate.description: Use level 'warning' when there are high-priority action items assigned to me; omit otherwise.

contentTemplate.label: Meetings
contentTemplate.description: One row per processed meeting. Expected columns: Time, Title, Organizer, My Items, Action Items, Decisions, Transcript, Report File.

contentTemplate.title: Per-Meeting Details
contentTemplate.description: One nested section per processed meeting.

contentTemplate.label: All Action Items
contentTemplate.description: Columns: Owner, Action, Priority, Deadline, Source.

contentTemplate.label: Open Report
contentTemplate.description: Link to the markdown report saved on disk.

contentTemplate.label: Meeting Link
contentTemplate.description: Calendar event webLink for quick navigation.

contentTemplate.title: Failed Dispatches
contentTemplate.description: Optional section listing meetings whose processor child orchestrations failed.

contentTemplate.label: Run Notes
contentTemplate.description: Free-form notes from the orchestration run (e.g. transcripts missing on most meetings, warnings, transient retries).

expectedActions.label: Open Action Items Folder
expectedActions.description: Open the local Meeting Action Items folder (the configured actionItemsDir).

expectedActions.label: Dismiss
expectedActions.description: Archive this run summary without further action.
